introSection: Giant Dipper is an wooden roller coaster built by Arthur Looff and designed by Prior and Church Company currently located at Santa Cruz Beach Boardwalk in Santa Cruz, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: On May 5, 2007, the ride was recognized as an ACE Roller Coaster Landmark by American Coaster Enthusiasts.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride originally used trains build by the Prior and Church Company. These would be replaced with Morgan in 1984.

fullText:
Giant Dipper is an wooden roller coaster built by Arthur Looff and designed by Prior and Church Company currently located at Santa Cruz Beach Boardwalk in Santa Cruz, California, USA.

On May 5, 2007, the ride was recognized as an ACE Roller Coaster Landmark by American Coaster Enthusiasts.



Red track and white supports.

The ride originally used trains build by the Prior and Church Company. These would be replaced with Morgan in 1984.
